info.title: iCIMS API
info.description: The iCIMS Talent Cloud API provides programmatic access to iCIMS recruiting and talent acquisition platform resources including people (candidates/employees), jobs, applicant workflows (applications), users, folders, and assessments. It supports searching, creating, and updating records across the iCIMS system.

get.description: Search and retrieve a list of person records (candidates, employees, etc.) based on query parameters.

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: Free text search across person fields

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter by email address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

200.description: A list of person records matching the search criteria

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid

post.description: Create a new person record (candidate, employee, etc.) in iCIMS.

Location.description: URL of the newly created person resource

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid

get.description: Retrieve a specific person record by their unique identifier.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the person

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid

patch.description: Partially update an existing person record.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the person

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token obtained from the iCIMS authorization server

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by the iCIMS API

field.description: The field that caused the error

Person.description: A person record representing a candidate, employee, or other individual in iCIMS

phones.description: Phone numbers associated with the person

source.description: How the person was sourced (e.g., career site, referral)

createdDate.description: Date and time when the person record was created

updatedDate.description: Date and time when the person record was last updated

PersonInput.description: Input payload for creating or updating a person record

total.description: Total number of records matching the query

Job.description: A job requisition record in iCIMS

jobType.description: Type of job (e.g., Full-Time, Part-Time, Contract)

status.description: Current status of the job requisition

numberOpenings.description: Number of open positions for this job

createdDate.description: Date the job record was created

updatedDate.description: Date the job record was last updated

JobInput.description: Input payload for creating or updating a job requisition

total.description: Total number of records matching the query

Application.description: An applicant workflow record linking a person to a job in iCIMS

id.description: Unique identifier for the applicant workflow

updatedDate.description: Date the record was last updated

ApplicationInput.description: Input payload for creating or updating an applicant workflow

ApplicationList.description: Paginated list of applicant workflow records

total.description: Total number of records matching the query

active.description: Whether the user account is active

updatedDate.description: Date the user was last updated

total.description: Total number of records matching the query

Folder.description: A folder for organizing records in iCIMS

total.description: Total number of records matching the query

createdDate.description: Date the assessment record was created

updatedDate.description: Date the assessment record was last updated

AssessmentInput.description: Input payload for creating an assessment

personId.description: Identifier of the person to assess

total.description: Total number of records matching the query

SearchRequest.description: Structured search request with filters and pagination

fields.description: List of field names to return in results

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

SearchFilter.description: A single filter condition for search

total.description: Total number of records matching the search
Total number of records matching the search

SearchResultsApplications.description: Search results containing applicant workflow records

total.description: Total number of records matching the search
